title: Proclamation No. 1221, s. 1974
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1221

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 10, DATED FEBRUARY 9, 1924, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE FORBES PARK FOREST RESERVATION, PARCEL III, SITUATED IN SECTION “D”, CITY OF BAGUIO, ISLAND OF LUZON, A CERTAIN PORTION EMBRACED THEREIN, AND DECLARING THE SAME AS LAND GRANT TO THE SAINT LOUIS UNIVERSITY OF BAGUIO CITY FOR COLLEGE OF MEDICINE AND COMMUNITY HOSPITAL SITE PURPOSES.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested by law in me, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 10 dated February 9, 1924, which established the Forbes Park Reservation, Parcel III, a certain portion of land embraced therein situated in Residence Section “D”, Baguio Townsite, Island of Luzon, and declare the same as land grant to the Saint Louis University of Baguio City for College of Medicine and Community Hospital site purposes, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows: to wit:

A parcel of land (LRC) SWO-13239, situated in Residence Section “D”, City of Baguio. Bounded on the N., along line 3-4-5,by PSU-210605, Hipolita Eslao; on the E., along line 5-6, by Lot 2-J (LRC) Psd-92083, Leonilo Ocampo; along line 6-7-8, by Swo-12873, Lorenzo Guirrey; on the SE., along line 8-9, by Public Land, along line 9-10-11, by Lot 4, Psu-188437, .Sergio Molintas; on the S., by Public Land, on the W., along line 1-2 by Pacdal Road; and on the NW., along line, 2-3, by Pacdal Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 75 deg. 04′ E., 255.24 m . from Triangulation Station “D”, Baguio Townsite,

thence N. 1 deg. 25′ W., 110.96 m. to point 2; thence N. 59 deg. 29′ E., 80.60 m . to point 3; thence N. 74 deg. 22′ E., 43.80 m . to point.4; thence N. 75 deg. 40′ E., 56.79 m. to point 5; thence Due South 39.99 m. to point 6; thence S. 7 deg. 18′ E., 34.18 m. to point 7; thence S. 22 deg. 32′ W., 39.81 m . to point 8; thence N. 87 deg. 47′ W . ,57.73 m. to point 9; thence S. 34 deg. 44′ W.,43.39 m. to point 10; thence S. 20 deg. 29′ E., 34.76 m . to point 11; thence S. 89 deg. 13′ W., 82.77 m. to point of

beginning; containing an area of Nineteen Thousand One Hundred Ninety-eight (19,198) Square Meters, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground.

IN WITNESS whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 14th day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-four.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) ALEJANDRO MELCHOR Executive Secretary

Source: National Library
